patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/local.py b/asgiref/local.py
index 845313a..a22e24a 100644
--- a/asgiref/local.py
+++ b/asgiref/local.py
@@ -24,7 +24,8 @@ class _CVar:
         if key == "_data":
             return super().__setattr__(key, value)
 
-        storage_object = self._data.get({}).copy()
+        storage_object = self._data.get({})
+        storage_object = storage_object.copy()
         storage_object[key] = value
         self._data.set(storage_object)
 
@@ -36,7 +37,6 @@ class _CVar:
         else:
             raise AttributeError(f"{self!r} object has no attribute {key!r}")
 
-
 class Local:
     """Local storage for async tasks.
 
diff --git a/asgiref/timeout.py b/asgiref/timeout.py
index fd5381d..254bc05 100644
--- a/asgiref/timeout.py
+++ b/asgiref/timeout.py
@@ -112,7 +112,8 @@ class timeout:
         self._task = None
         return None
 
-    def _cancel_task(self) -> None:
-        if self._task is not None:
-            self._task.cancel()
+    def _cancel_task (self) -> None :
+        if not self._cancelled:
             self._cancelled = True
+            if self._task is not None and not self._task.done():
+                self._task.cancel()
\ No newline at end of file
